channel.title: general computer on My Hugo

item.title: make
item.description: Auto-Dependency Generation | GNU make Writing a large build system with GNU make Makefile performance: recursive make & dependency discovery A guide to .vcxproj and .props file structure | The Visual Studio Blog GNU make: Functions Ninja, a small build system with a focus on speed GYP - Generate Your Projects. tools/gn/docs - chromium/src - Git at Google Build systems: Premake | Anteru's blog Metaprogramming | GNU make How Not to Use VPATH | GNU make Rules of Makefiles | GNU make Multi-Architecture Builds | GNU make gcc44-4.

item.title: misc

item.title: security
item.description: Public Key Cryptography — Botan String comparison: crypto_verify Crypto++ Library 5.6.5 | Free C++ Class Library of Cryptographic Schemes Build Your Own Certificate Authority (CA) | Vault - HashiCorp Learn Add Self-Signed SSL Cert To cURL - Lee Blue Get the CA cert for curl | daniel.haxx.se ldapjs: A reprise of LDAP | Node.js Use LDAP for authentication and authorization in your Node.js Bluemix application 3 Steps to Perform SSH Login Without Password Using ssh-keygen & ssh-copy-id asec-f02-writing-secure-software-is-hard-but-at-least-add-mitigations_final.

item.title: version control

item.title: xml
item.description: When Others Then Null: Validate XML against an XSD using Notepad++ XML Validation: XML Validation The Apache Xerces™ Project - xerces.apache.org amouat/xsd-validator: Validates XML files against XML schema eclipse: validate xml with xsd - Stack Overflow XML Schema Generator Validation with lxml Help - Eclipse Platform Validating with XML Schema (The Java™ Tutorials > Java API for XML Processing (JAXP) > Document Object Model) rapidxml.sourceforge.net/manual.html xml parsing - What XML parser should I use in C++?

item.title: game
item.description: Godot Engine - Free and open source 2D and 3D game engine Why Python and Pygame are a great pair for beginning programmers | Opensource.com Phaser - A fast, fun and free open source HTML5 game framework https://www.pygame.org/news Kivy: Cross-platform Python Framework for NUI Development Panda3D - Free 3D Game Engine Getting Started · GitBook cocos2d Program Arcade Games With Python And Pygame
